speaker: speaker1
text: So , Monica , how do you like your new office ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I love it . The room is spacious and clean with big windows and a lot of sunshine . There are plants along the corridor . Especially , I got my own desk with computer and telephone . Such a great place !

speaker: speaker1
text: That ’ s very good . I once turn down a job offer just because the office is awful .

speaker: speaker2
text: What was so bad about it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Small rooms , small window , a small desk shared by three people . I would have been interrupted all the time and for sure not be able to deliver good work .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sounds bad ! Lucky you ! You didn ’ t take that job . I think a good office environment is also important to work efficiently .

speaker: speaker1
text: Totally agree . By the way , the number of the telephone on your desk is extension 506 . You can pick up your office supplies from the supply room at the end of the corridor .
